title: Sqlitelogictest algebra.rangejoin undefined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (col1 Int32, col2 Int32, col3 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY col1;
CREATE TABLE test2 (col1 Int32, col2 String, col3 Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY col1;
SELECT * FROM test1 CROSS JOIN test2 WHERE test1.col2 BETWEEN test2.col1 AND 100;
key_bug_features: CROSS JOIN with NULL in BETWEEN clause
